notes: B7_regulations holds extracted YAML/MD for norms. Source PDFs may live in B2_csn_standards/ (legacy convention for ČSN-like binaries) or in GCS (large-format references). Each subfolder includes a source_pointer.md describing PDF location and Vertex AI / RAG ingest status.
